name: Glimpse of North Vietnam: 5-day Budget Tour
highlights: Take a look at Hanoi's local life through several historic sites and busy alleys of the Old Quarter
Hear about the stories about Vietnam's bygone era and admire the old-aged architecture in the former capital Hoa Lu.
Explore the stunning Tam Coc by boarding a wooden row boat and cruising a river surrounded by towering limestone karsts and vibrant rice paddies
Marvel at the UNESCO Heritage limestone karsts of Halong Bay and engage in exclusive activities there

itinerary.title: Hanoi Arrival
itinerary.description:
Welcome to Hanoi, Vietnam's captivating capital city!

Upon your arrival at Noi Bai International Airport, our friendly tour guide will be there to greet you and ensure a smooth transfer to your hotel located in the vibrant city center. Once you've checked in and settled into your comfortable room, take some time to relax and rejuvenate. Hanoi Old Quarter is a treasure trove of history and culture. With its 36 streets showcasing traditional craft villages that have withstood the test of time, this lovely city will not disappoint you. NOTE: Hotel rooms are usually available at 14:00, any check-...

itinerary.title: Hanoi Half-day City Tour
itinerary.description:
Morning

Start your day off right with a delicious breakfast at your hotel, ensuring you have plenty of energy for your adventure ahead. Guests should take the opportunity to savor the flavors of local cuisine and fuel up for the day. Your first stop is the renowned Temple of Literature, a historical gem, and the country's first university. Marvel at the exquisite traditional Vietnamese architecture as you delve into the rich history and cultural significance of this revered site. Next, prepare to be captivated by the unique beauty of One Pillar Pagoda

itinerary.title: Ninh Binh: Hoa Lu & Tam Coc Discovery
itinerary.description:
Morning

Start your day off right with a hearty breakfast at your hotel, ensuring you have ample energy for the day ahead. At 07:30, embark on a scenic drive to Ninh Binh Province, where you'll discover the captivating wonders of this region. Begin your journey at Hoa Lu, the ancient capital of Vietnam during the Dinh and Le dynasties. This UNESCO-recognized architectural complex showcases the rich history of the Trang An World Heritage site, a must-visit cultural relic of great importance. Prepare to be enchanted as we embark on a boat trip along the picturesque Tam Coc River which is adorned...

itinerary.title: Hanoi - Halong Bay Day Cruise
itinerary.description:
Morning

Start your day with a delicious breakfast at your hotel in Hanoi, fueling up for an incredible journey to the mesmerizing Halong Bay - a majestic wonderland renowned as a UNESCO World Heritage site. The morning starts early as a cruise gliding through the enchanting waters adorned with mesmerizing rock formations. Following your cruise itinerary, guests will join the captivating cave exploration by kayaking or bamboo boat. Beyond its awe-inspiring landscapes, Halong Bay has many magnificent caves, each exuding its unique charm. Depending on your chosen route, you'll have the opportuni...

itinerary.title: Hanoi Departure
itinerary.description: Indulge in a delightful morning at Hanoi Old Quarter as you savor a scrumptious breakfast at your hotel. After that, you can take your time to soak in the charm of this vibrant city, immersing yourself in its unique atmosphere at the last minute before the department. NOTE: The hotel's check-out time is at noon, so you still have time for the last morning in the captivating city of Hanoi. If you wish to extend your leisure time before your departure, we can arrange a late check-out for you (subject to room availability) with a surcharge.

included: Accommodation in TWN/ DBL sharing accommodation at hotel, except overnight on train and homestay (if any)
All in-tour stationed local English speaking guide.
Entrance fees for Vietnam attractions, as per itinerary
Meals as indicated in the program
importantNotes: PROGRAMS & SCHEDULES SUBJECT TO CHANGE WITHOUT PRIOR NOTICE
